changelog: v3.4.5: FASE B COMPLETA - Vendor-Specific Monitoring esteso a tutti i 13 profili. Backend aggiunta logica alert automatici per: HPE Comware (CPU/mem/temp + fan/PSU fault), HP ProCurve (psuStatus, fanStatus, tempSensor), MikroTik (PSU1/PSU2 + temperature), Cisco IOS (ciscoEnvMonTemperatureStatusValue + cpmCPUTotal5min), QNAP (hddSMART: ERROR/WARNING), Zyxel (CPU 5min + RAM), Synology (systemStatus + diskStatus oltre a RAID/temp gia' presenti), UPS generico (upsEstimatedMinutesRemaining + upsOutputPercentLoad). Frontend nuovo componente VendorDetailsPanel.js che mostra telemetria vendor-specific con tab dedicati: Synology (Sistema/RAID/Dischi/CPU), UPS (Batteria/Alimentazione/Identificazione), Fortinet (Sistema/VPN), Switch generico (CPU/Mem/Temp/Fan/PSU), fallback GenericPanel raw metrics. Integrato in DeviceDetailPanel automaticamente. Nuovo endpoint backend /api/devices/by-ip/{ip}/vendor-details. Include tutti i fix v3.4.4 (Poll-VendorOids connector SNMP), v3.4.3 (Edge CDP --no-sandbox), v3.4.2 (RMT X-RMT-Token header).
